steps.description: Press the F1 key to open the command palette in Visual Studio Code.
Click the search input field in the VS Code command palette at the top center of the interface to activate command selection.
Type the text 'deploy' into the Visual Studio Code command palette input box at the top of the window.
Press Enter to select "Microsoft 365 Agents: Deploy" in the VS Code command palette.
Press the Enter key to activate the "Deploy" button in the "Do you want to deploy resources in dev environment?" dialog within Visual Studio Code.

Click the "y" key in the integrated terminal of Visual Studio Code to proceed with the installation prompt for "@azure/static-web-apps-cli", as part of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit deployment process.
Press the Enter key in the VS Code Terminal to confirm the "Ok to proceed? (y/n)" prompt during Azure Static Web Apps CLI deployment using Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit.
Press the F1 key to open the command palette in Visual Studio Code.
Type 'Notifications: Show Notifications' into the VS Code command palette input field at the top center of the Visual Studio Code interface.
Press Enter to select "Notifications: Show Notifications" in the Visual Studio Code command palette.
@assertion notification "actions in deploy stage executed successfully" exist.
